mapper.select: SELECT o.orders_id, o.status, o.total_price, o.address, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(o.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS estimated_delivery, oi.order_item_id, p.product_name, pt.product_url AS img_url, s.size_name, c.color_name, oi.price, oi.quantity FROM orders_tb o JOIN user_tb u ON o.user_id = u.user_id JOIN order_item_tb oi ON o.orders_id = oi.orders_id JOIN product_tb p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MIN(product_url) AS product_url FROM product_thumbnail_tb GROUP BY product_id ) pt ON p.product_id = pt.product_id JOIN size_tb s ON oi.size_id = s.size_id JOIN color_tb c ON oi.color_id = c.color_id WHERE u.email = #{email} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT o.orders_id AS orderId, u.user_name AS customerName, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT( COALESCE(p.product_name, '상품정보없음'), '(', COALESCE(c.color_name, '-'), ' / ', COALESCE(s.size_name, '-'), ') x', oi.quantity ) ORDER BY oi.order_item_id SEPARATOR ' | ' ) AS productSummary, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.created_at AS orderDate, o.status AS status FROM orders_tb o JOIN user_tb u ON o.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN order_item_tb oi ON o.orders_id = oi.orders_id LEFT JOIN product_tb p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN color_tb c ON oi.color_id = c.color_id LEFT JOIN size_tb s ON oi.size_id = s.size_id GROUP BY o.orders_id, u.user_name, o.total_price, o.created_at, o.status ORDER BY o.created_at DESC, o.orders_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders_tb SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE orders_id = #{ordersId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item_tb (orders_id, product_id, size_id, color_id, price, quantity) VALUES (#{ordersId}, #{productId}, #{sizeId}, #{colorId}, #{price}, #{quantity})
INSERT INTO orders_tb (user_id, status, total_price, address, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, '결제완료', #{totalPrice}, #{address}, NOW(), NOW())
